workshoptitle: Build Telecom Operations Intelligence with Oracle Database 26ai

tutorials.title: Introduction
tutorials.description: The Seer Comms telecom operations story and workshop goals.

tutorials.title: Getting Started
tutorials.description: Open SQL Worksheet and verify the workshop schema.

tutorials.title: Lab 1: Telecom Data Foundation
tutorials.description: Inspect the schema foundation and feature objects.

tutorials.title: Lab 2: Network Experience Operations Center
tutorials.description: Query operational KPIs and service pressure evidence.

tutorials.title: Lab 3: Subscriber Signals with AI Vector Search
tutorials.description: Rank subscriber signals and services by semantic meaning.

tutorials.title: Lab 4: Subscriber and Network Impact Graph
tutorials.description: Investigate connected telecom impact with graph data.

tutorials.title: Lab 5: Network Access and Field Operations
tutorials.description: Use spatial and capacity evidence for field decisions.

tutorials.title: Lab 6: Subscriber Service Orders with JSON Relational Duality
tutorials.description: Compare relational and document-shaped service orders.

tutorials.title: Lab 7: Predictive Service Assurance with OML
tutorials.description: Connect model-style scores to capacity and retention decisions.

tutorials.title: Lab 8: Ask Telecom Operations Data
tutorials.description: Use visible SQL as the trusted-answer pattern.

tutorials.title: Lab 9: AI-Assisted Service Assurance
tutorials.description: Review Oracle-backed tool evidence and action audit rows.

tutorials.title: Lab 10: Conclusion
tutorials.description: Connect the labs into one operating loop.

tutorials.title: Lab 11: Final Quiz
tutorials.description: Check your understanding with scored questions.

tutorials.title: Need Help?
tutorials.description: Solutions to common problems and directions for receiving Live Help.
